title: Fuengirola catamaran hire at sunset: costs, tips and 2026 season
html:
Sunset catamaran hire in Fuengirola offers a memorable evening on the Mediterranean, with departures from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola. Shared tours start at around €60 per person, while private skippered charters in Fuengirola typically range from €800 to €2,500 for a full evening. BoatHire24 connects you with verified operators for a seamless booking experience.

How much does it cost to hire a catamaran for sunset in Fuengirola?

Prices for sunset catamaran hire in Fuengirola range from €60 for a shared tour to €2,500 for a private full-day charter. A typical two-hour sunset shared cruise costs €60, €90 per person. Private half-day charters for up to 12 guests start at about €800. Full-day crewed catamarans can exceed €2,000, depending on extras like catering and water toys. You can compare verified boat listings on BoatHire24.

Where to set off in Fuengirola

Most sunset catamarans depart from Puerto Deportivo de Fuengirola, the main marina in town. Charter bases also operate from Marina La Cala de Mijas, a short drive east, and from Puerto Banús in Marbella, about 25 minutes west. For a quieter departure, consider Sotogrande marina, 40 minutes south. The bay of Fuengirola offers calm waters ideal for evening cruises, with views of the Sierra de Mijas mountains. You can skippered charters in Fuengirola for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent for a sunset cruise

  1. Catamaran, Best for stable, spacious lounging on deck. Suitable for groups of 10, 12. From €800 for a half-day sunset charter.
  2. Motor yacht, Great for speed and luxury, carrying 8, 10 guests. From €1,200 for a half-day.
  3. Sailboat, Perfect for a classic sailing experience with a smaller group of 6. From €500 for a sunset trip.
  4. RIB or day cruiser, Ideal for a small family or couple, accommodating 4, 6. From €300 for a two-hour sunset ride.

For a premium catamaran experience, browse the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft charter page, which lists a spacious 70-foot vessel with ample deck space and a crew. One option worth a look is the Shangani Blue Lagoon 70 ft charter page.

Costs of boat rental in Fuengirola

  • Shared sunset tour: €60, €90 per person, 2 hours, includes drinks.
  • Small motorboat (half-day): €250, €400, 4 hours, no licence needed for some models.
  • Catamaran full-day private: €1,500, €2,500, up to 12 guests, includes crew.
  • Crewed yacht (full-day): €2,000, €3,500, 8, 10 guests, luxury finish.

When to book and do you need a licence?

The best season for sunset catamaran hire in Fuengirola runs from May to October, with high season in July and August. The prevailing Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon, but evenings are typically calm. For most catamarans and yachts with a skipper, you do not need a licence. If you wish to rent a boat without a crew, the operator will confirm exact requirements based on your licence and the vessel. You can also see more on the BoatHire24 marketplace.

For the most magical sunset, book a cruise that departs one hour before sundown and heads west towards the headland of Cala de Mijas; this gives you uninterrupted views of the sun dipping behind the hills.

At a glance

  • Price range: €60, €2,500 depending on shared or private charter
  • Peak months: May to October, especially July and August
  • Trip length: 2 hours (shared) to full day
  • Guest capacity: up to 12 on most private catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Fuengirola

Can I rent a catamaran without a licence in Fuengirola?

Yes, you can charter a skippered catamaran without any licence, as the crew handles navigation.

How far is Fuengirola from Gibraltar for a day trip by boat?

The distance by sea from Fuengirola to Gibraltar is roughly 40 nautical miles, which a motor yacht can cover in under two hours.

Is sunset catamaran hire suitable for children?

Yes, catamarans are stable and family‑friendly; many operators welcome children on board.

What time does the sunset cruise typically depart?

Departures are usually scheduled 60 to 90 minutes before sunset, which in summer is around 19:30 to 20:30 local time.

Whether you want a shared tour or a private luxury experience, the BoatHire24 marketplace makes it easy to compare options and book with confidence. Boat owners in Fuengirola are invited to list their vessel on the platform to reach a global audience.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Fuengirola and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
